text.tspan: IF every replica starts in the same state
AND every replica applies the same operations in the same order
THEN every replica ends in the same state.
Replicated Log provides the 'same order' part.
Consensus (Raft/Paxos) is how replicas agree on that order.

g.text: Leader writes ordered log + replicates byte-identical entries
Each replica APPLIES entries in log order u2014 produces identical state
